title: Secure adopting partner/steward + independent verification of license/provenance/grading/review gates
context: This is the deed: secure a real beneficiary (research group / advocacy nonprofit / curation community) as an adopter, assign a steward, flip verifiedNeed to true, and obtain independent verification that all licensing/provenance/grading/review gates hold. Driven by a dated partner-acquisition plan, with a build-vs-mothball/pivot rule if no adopter is secured by ~2027-03-31. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Secure an adopting partner/steward and obtain independent verification that provenance coverage is 100%, license-composition correct (no restricted content in bodies), evidence grading present + framework-named, and all research cards domain-signed-off (patient cards dual-signed-off), applying the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule if no adopter is secured by ~2027-03-31.
acceptanceCriteria: A real beneficiary (research group / advocacy nonprofit / curation community) is secured as an adopter; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true

Independent verification that: provenance coverage = 100%, license-composition correct (no restricted content in bodies), evidence grading present + framework-named, all research cards domain-signed-off (and any shipped patient cards dual-signed-off)

Driven by the dated partner-acquisition plan; if no adopter is secured by ~2027-03-31, apply the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule (donate cards + schema to an open curation commons, or mothball to maintenance-only) - recorded in governance
